3091920.name: Unrest Demo
3091920.description:
Welcome to Unrest, a PvP third-person shooter where humans and aliens clash in a futuristic battle for control of the battlefield. Fast-paced combat, unique characters, and ever-changing battlefields create an experience where no two matches are the same.

Unique Characters & Abilities

Every hero in Unrest comes with a completely unique ability and specialized equipment. These abilities are more than just flashy powers; they define your role in battle, shape team strategies, and open the door to unforgettable plays. Choosing the right character means choosing how you want to fight.

Dynamic Maps

Battles take place on maps that constantly change as the fight unfolds. One moment you’re chasing down enemies under clear skies, the next you’re caught in a devastating tornado or a freezing blizzard. Lightning storms, environmental hazards, and shifting terrain force you to adapt quickly, keeping every match fresh and unpredictable.

Environmental Destruction

The battlefield isn’t just a backdrop; it’s part of the fight. Walls, energy barriers, and structures can be destroyed to flush out enemies hiding in cover. Every shot you fire can reshape the battlefield, meaning strategy comes not only from countering your opponents, but also from mastering a space that refuses to stay the same.

Faction-Based Warfare

Choose your side in a war that defines the future. Human Colonists bring advanced technology and aggressive tactics, while Alien Rebels use resilience and raw power to fight back. Each faction feels distinct, and battles between them are as asymmetric as they are intense.

Now it’s your turn to step into the action-packed world of Unrest and join the fight that will decide the fate of the galaxy! With its diverse maps, rich game modes, unique characters, and pure action, Unrest is calling you!
3091920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
